The Ad Blocker for Chrome That Respects Your Privacy

Block banner ads, popups, and trackers instantly — all filtering happens locally on your device. No subscriptions. No data collection. Just faster, cleaner browsing.

Everything You Need to Browse Without Interruption

Stop banner ads, pop-ups, auto-play videos, and overlay ads before they load — on news sites, blogs, forums, YouTube, and more. AdShield Pro uses Chrome's native declarativeNetRequest system for fast, rule-based filtering with no performance hit.

Block Ads on Every Website

Stop banner ads, pop-ups, auto-play videos, and overlay ads before they load.

Stop Trackers Silently Following You

AdShield Pro blocks third-party trackers, analytics scripts, and ad network pixels — so your browsing stays yours.

Speed Up Your Browser Instantly

Users report noticeably faster page load times, lower CPU usage, and reduced data consumption.

One-Click Setup

Install from the Chrome Web Store and you're protected immediately. No configuration needed.

Manifest V3 Native

Built from the ground up for Chrome's modern extension standard — not a patched legacy extension.

Enterprise-Grade Protection for Every User

Tired of mid-roll interruptions and invisible trackers? AdShield Pro utilizes smart behavioral detection and Manifest V3 architecture for long-term compatibility.

See all features
AdShield Pro stops ads at the source:
  • Advanced YouTube Ad Blocking
  • Stealth Tracker Prevention
  • Manifest V3 Ready architecture
  • Stops auto-play and display ads
Smart, local-only blocking

Unlike simple blockers that rely on dated lists, AdShield Pro uses a smart, rule-based filtering engine that works entirely offline for faster, more reliable blocking — without sending your data to any third-party servers.

🔍 Stop Trackers — Protect Your Privacy

Invisible pixels from social networks and data brokers follow you across the web. Our extension identifies and neutralizes these trackers, preventing companies from building a profile of your personal habits.

🛑
Blocks third-party trackers

Analytics scripts, ad network trackers, social media monitors, and more.

🔒
Prevents data leakage

Your browsing data stays on your device — never sent to remote servers.

📵
Zero tracking, zero telemetry

AdShield Pro does not collect, store, or transmit your browsing data — guaranteed.

This means your search history, visited sites, and online behavior remain fully private.

Learn more in our Privacy Policy.

⏱️ Faster Browsing — Less Clutter, More Speed

Ads and trackers don't just annoy — they slow down your browser. Each ad banner, script, or tracking pixel adds extra load time, increasing data consumption and decreasing performance.

By blocking unwanted content before it loads, AdShield Pro makes your web experience smoother and more responsive — especially on slower connections or metered data plans.

With AdShield Pro you get:

✓Faster page load times
✓Reduced data usage
✓Lower CPU & memory load
✓Improved battery life on laptops & mobile

AdShield Pro's core ad blocking is completely free. For users who want deeper control, the Pro upgrade is a one-time purchase — no monthly fees, no renewal reminders, no hidden costs.

Get Pro — One-Time Purchase →

How AdShield Pro Works

AdShield Pro runs entirely inside your browser using Chrome's built-in Manifest V3 filtering engine. When you visit a website, it silently matches network requests against a curated list of known ad and tracking domains — and blocks them before they ever load.

🖥️
Local Filtering
  • All filtering is local — nothing leaves your device
  • No cloud servers, no external processing
🔄
Automatic Updates

Filter lists updated regularly to catch new ad techniques.

⚡
Zero Performance Hit

Works silently in the background with near-zero memory use.

The result? Faster decisions, stronger privacy, stronger blocking — all while keeping your data secure and private.

🧩 Works Across Your Favorite Browsers

AdShield Pro supports all major Chromium-based browsers like:

Google Chrome
Microsoft Edge
Brave
Opera

📣 What Users Are Saying

Users around the world trust AdShield Pro to protect their privacy, block ads, and speed up their browsing experience — and you can too.

"AdShield Pro transformed my browser — pages load faster and I don't see those annoying ads anymore."

— Satisfied User

"I was tired of trackers following me around. AdShield Pro gives me peace of mind."

— Privacy Conscious Browser

Frequently Asked Questions

Is AdShield Pro free?

Yes. Core ad blocking and tracker protection are completely free with no usage limits.

Does AdShield Pro work on YouTube?

AdShield Pro blocks many ad types across websites. Effectiveness on streaming platforms may vary as ad delivery methods change frequently.

Will AdShield Pro slow down my browser?

No — it speeds it up. By blocking ads and trackers before they load, pages render faster and use less CPU and memory.

Is AdShield Pro Manifest V3 compatible?

Yes. AdShield Pro was built for Manifest V3 from the start, using Chrome's declarativeNetRequest API for efficient, future-proof filtering.

Does AdShield Pro collect my data?

Never. All filtering is done locally on your device. We collect zero browsing data, usage statistics, or personal information.

Start Browsing Without Ads Today

No accounts. No subscriptions. No data collection. Just install and enjoy a faster, cleaner, more private web.

Add to Chrome — Free View Pricing
Why Choose AdShield Pro Over Other Ad Blockers?

No "Acceptable Ads" Program: Unlike Adblock Plus, AdShield Pro does not participate in any "acceptable ads" program. If it's an ad, we block it — period.

No Subscription Traps: Most premium ad blockers charge monthly fees. AdShield Pro's Pro plan is a single, one-time payment for lifetime access.
